chapter_title.en: Chapter on Miscellaneous Matters Related to Hajj

text: 3127 - وَ أَمَّا اَلْحَدِيثُ اَلَّذِي رُوِيَ، عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ أَنَّهُ قَالَ : «مَنْ رَكِبَ زَامِلَةً فَلْيُوصِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Hadith.3127 - As for the narration reported from Abu Abdullah (as) where he said: "Whoever rides a zamilah (simple mount) should make a will,"
